videos.title: The Skii Train - Skinouk/Whitehorse Cross-Country Skii CSFEP Exchange
videos.description:
Canada Sports Friendship Exchange Program (CSFEP)....
A Cross-Country Exchange between Skinouk, Gatineau and Whitehorse, Yukon - with the groups having fun cross-country skiing in Gatineau Park...

videos.title: Father Mouchet Loppet
videos.description: Easter weekend was the perfect time to hold the First Annual Father Mouchet Memorial Ski Loppet in Old Crow, Yukon. With a great turnout, community members strapping on skis for the first time in over 4 decades, and strong efforts put in from the youth- the weekend was a great success!!

videos.title: Whitehorse youth up for $5K prize for ski wax science fair project
videos.description:
It's thanks to his science fair project involving AI, cross-country skiing and wax. As the CBC's George Maratos tells us, it's something that could revolutionize the sport.

#Whitehorse #CrossCounry #Skiing

videos.title: Yukon Arctic Winter Games athletes draw inspiration from family and Olympians
videos.description:
International Women’s Day is this Sunday, and in Whitehorse some young athletes in the upcoming Arctic Winter Games are marking the occasion and saying they’re proud to follow in the footsteps of the women who came before them. Tori Fitzpatrick reports.

#whitehorse #yukon #internationalwomensday #awg 

Consider Subscribing
videos.transcript:
This winter, crossc country skiers on
team Yukon's under4 girls team witnessed
just how far female athletes can go.
Yukon cross country skier Sonia Schmidt
represented Canada at the Milano Cortina
Winter Games. But it wasn't that long
ago that Schmidt was in their shoes. She
competed for team Yukon at the 2018
Arctic Winter Games.
>> Um, I find that pretty amazing and it
gives me hope that I one day I could win
like keep going and eventually get to
the World Cup or Olympics. This year's
under 14 girls team had the opportunity
to meet Schmidt before she went to the
Olympics. They say it was an inspiring
experience and now it's their turn to
inspire young athletes. I think it
inspires me just to be a good teammate
and to like encourage others and to make
sure to encourage the girls who aren't
in our club or who are not in our age
group too and to just cheer for
everybody. Not too far from the ski
trails, some girls are supporting each
other on the ice instead. This team is
new and is the only Yukon girls curling
team competing at the games, and that's
because there's not a lot of girls
playing the sport. One of them says her
family, especially her aunt, inspired
her to try curling.
>> Whenever they talk about curling,
they're always so happy and they said it
was like a great thing in their lives,
and I want it to be the same for me.
>> Now, her team hopes they can inspire
young girls in the Yukon to try curling,
too. The Arctic Winter Games officially
kick off Sunday with the opening
ceremony here in downtown White Horse.
Tory Fitzpatrick, CBC News, White Horse.

videos.title: #TheMoment a Yukon skier unexpectedly made history by winning gold
videos.description:
Sonjaa Schmidt of Whitehorse became the first Canadian woman to win gold at the U23 Nordic World Ski Championship event in Slovenia.

#goodnews #skiing #news 

Watch The National live on YouTube Sunday-Friday at 9 p.m. ET

Subscribe to The National: 
https://www.youtube.com/user/CBCTheNational?sub_confirmation=1

More from CBC News | https://www.cbc.ca/news

The National is the flagship of CBC News, showcasing award-winning journalism from across Canada and around the world. Led by Chief Correspondent Adrienne Arsenault and Ian Hanomansing, our team of trusted reporters helps you make sense of the world, wherever you are.

videos.title: High Speed Humpty Dumpty at Lappe Nordic Ski Centre
Team Nunavut's small but mighty cross country ski team
videos.description:
It's the first time in years the territory has participated in the sport at the Arctic Winter Games. As Cheryl Kawaja found out, the team is full of grit and determination.

Consider Subscribing

videos.title: Sleeping Giant Loppet - Half Way Motors Thunder Bay
videos.transcript:
Hi, I'm Marcus Lof, general manager at
Halfway Motors Nissan. This is the 31st
year that we've been the presenting
sponsor of the Sleeping Giant Lobit.
Does a phenomenal job of promoting an
active, healthy lifestyle and is a
fantastic way of showcasing some of the
great things you can do in Northwestern
Ontario. Thank you very much to all the
organizers and volunteers of the event.
We look forward to seeing everybody
again next year.
[Music]
